relationship_hints.meaning: Occupation concept joins to occupation-skill relation edges.
Skill concept joins to occupation-skill relation edges.
Skill-to-skill graph edges for related, optional, or knowledge links.
Occupation rows reference an ISCO classification code.
Readable multi-level hierarchy projection for skills and skill groups.
